instructions.name: auipc
instructions.description: Add upper immediate to pc: rd = pc + (imm << 12).

instructions.name: jal
instructions.description: Jump and link: rd = pc+4; pc += imm.

instructions.name: jalr
instructions.description: Jump and link register: rd = pc+4; pc = (rs1+imm) & ~1.

instructions.name: beq
instructions.description: Conditional branch if equal: if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: bne
instructions.description: Conditional branch if not equal: if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: blt
instructions.description: Conditional branch if less than (signed): if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: bge
instructions.description: Conditional branch if greater-or-equal (signed): if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: bltu
instructions.description: Conditional branch if less than (unsigned): if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: bgeu
instructions.description: Conditional branch if greater-or-equal (unsigned): if (rs1 ? rs2) pc += imm.

instructions.name: addi
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = rs1 + imm.

instructions.name: slti
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = (rs1 < imm) signed.

instructions.name: sltiu
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = (rs1 < imm) unsigned.

instructions.name: xori
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = rs1 ^ imm.

instructions.name: ori
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = rs1 | imm.

instructions.name: andi
instructions.description: Immediate ALU op: rd = rs1 & imm.

instructions.name: add
instructions.description: Register ALU op: rd = rs1 + rs2.

instructions.name: sub
instructions.description: Register ALU op: rd = rs1 - rs2.

instructions.name: sll
instructions.description: Register ALU op: shift left logical.

instructions.name: slt
instructions.description: Register ALU op: set less than (signed).

instructions.name: sltu
instructions.description: Register ALU op: set less than (unsigned).

instructions.name: xor
instructions.description: Register ALU op: rd = rs1 ^ rs2.

instructions.name: srl
instructions.description: Register ALU op: shift right logical.

instructions.name: sra
instructions.description: Register ALU op: shift right arithmetic.

instructions.name: or
instructions.description: Register ALU op: rd = rs1 | rs2.

instructions.name: and
instructions.description: Register ALU op: rd = rs1 & rs2.

instructions.name: fence
instructions.description: Order device I/O and memory accesses across the fence.

instructions.name: ecall
instructions.description: Environment call: trap to the execution environment.

instructions.name: sllw
instructions.description: 32-bit shift left logical, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: srlw
instructions.description: 32-bit shift right logical, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: sraw
instructions.description: 32-bit shift right arithmetic, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: csrrw
instructions.description: Atomic read/write CSR: rd = csr; csr = rs1.

instructions.name: csrrs
instructions.description: Atomic read & set bits: rd = csr; csr |= rs1.

instructions.name: csrrc
instructions.description: Atomic read & clear bits: rd = csr; csr &= ~rs1.

instructions.name: fence.i
instructions.description: Synchronize the instruction and data streams.

instructions.name: mul
instructions.description: Multiply/divide: low XLEN bits of rs1*rs2.

instructions.name: divw
instructions.description: 32-bit signed div, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: divuw
instructions.description: 32-bit unsigned div, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: remw
instructions.description: 32-bit signed rem, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: remuw
instructions.description: 32-bit unsigned rem, result sign-extended to 64 bits.

instructions.name: fsgnj.s
instructions.description: Sign-inject: copy rs1 with sign of rs2.

instructions.name: fclass.s
instructions.description: Classify the float into a 10-bit mask.
